name: Sovereign Training Quality Tooling Decision
decision: Adopt the full sovereign quality tooling layer. Implemented items remain mandatory gates before runtime activation or SF-50M scaling.

tools.evidence: assistant <eos> target and EOS-aware generation are active in training/generation code.
tools.next_action: keep mandatory in every assistant-target run

tools.evidence: dialogue stream keeps user/assistant markers and dialect conditioning before samples.
tools.next_action: audit packed examples before each training run
append every future training/eval/generation gate result

tools.evidence: corpus-audit and operational-dialogue filter exist; Phase 27.15 should add semantic short-reply scanner.
tools.next_action: scan weak social replies and malformed lexical targets before next training

tools.evidence: v0.8 fails greetings/thanks/Saudi preference despite lower eval loss.
tools.next_action: train from social micro-skills to short explanations before mixed corpus

tools.evidence: GenerationGuard catches repetition; decoder should prevent it earlier.
tools.next_action: add deterministic no-repeat ngram and repetition penalty tests

tools.evidence: Phase 27.11 exposed missing clean-stop; Phase 27.12 measured EOS improvement.
tools.next_action: expand probe to 32/64 social replies after curriculum repair

tools.evidence: v0.8 selected step6000 by held-out eval, then blocked by generation-quality.
tools.next_action: select by eval + clean-stop + generation-quality, never by latest checkpoint only

tools.evidence: tokenization-audit exists; boundary terms must be checked before tokenizer retrains.
tools.next_action: add explicit protected boundary audit if tokenizer v3 starts

seeded_experiments.name: Assistant Boundary/EOS Repair Probe
seeded_experiments.decision: Boundary/EOS improved stopping but does not yet pass semantic/dialect clean-stop; train v0.8 with boundary + dialect conditioning on broader corpus before SF-50M.

seeded_experiments.name: SF-10M v0.8 Boundary/EOS Wider Training
seeded_experiments.decision: Eval loss improved strongly, but raw generation still produces malformed Arabic fragments and fails social alignment.

next: Phase 27.15 — targeted social/lexical curriculum and decoder no-repeat controls for SF-10M.
